summary: Full-stack software engineer with 6 years of experience architecting and delivering scalable web applications. Specialized in React, TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native infrastructure on AWS. Reduced infrastructure costs by 35% through containerization and improved deployment frequency by 4x with CI/CD pipelines. Passionate about developer tooling, system design, and mentoring junior engineers.

bullets: Architected a microservices migration serving 500k+ daily active users, reducing API latency by 42% and cutting monthly cloud costs by $12,000
Led a team of 5 engineers to deliver 3 major product releases on schedule, achieving 99.95% uptime in production
Designed a real-time event processing pipeline handling 2M+ events daily using Kafka and Redis, improving data freshness from 15 minutes to under 3 seconds
Implemented comprehensive monitoring and alerting with Datadog and PagerDuty, reducing Mean Time to Resolution from 4 hours to 35 minutes
Established code review standards and CI/CD practices that increased deployment frequency from weekly to multiple times per day
Mentored 4 junior engineers through a structured onboarding program, accelerating their ramp-up time by 40%
Built a React and TypeScript dashboard processing 10k+ concurrent users with virtual scrolling and optimistic UI updates
Developed a RESTful API in Node.js and Express serving 15k requests per minute at sub-50ms p99 latency
Designed a PostgreSQL database schema supporting 200+ tables with proper indexing, reducing query times by 65%
Containerized the full application stack with Docker and orchestrated deployments on AWS ECS, achieving 99.9% uptime
Reduced bundle size by 55% through code splitting, tree shaking, and lazy loading strategies
Wrote 300+ unit and integration tests achieving 92% code coverage across frontend and backend services
Maintained and enhanced a legacy PHP application serving 50k+ users, migrating 80% of the codebase to modern Laravel patterns
Built RESTful APIs consuming third-party payment gateways processing $2M+ in monthly transaction volume
Automated database backup and recovery procedures, reducing data loss risk and achieving Recovery Point Objective under 15 minutes
Created an internal monitoring dashboard using Vue.js and Chart.js, saving the operations team 10 hours per week on manual checks
Implemented role-based access control for 3 user tiers, improving application security and passing SOC 2 audit requirements

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.school: National Institute of Applied Sciences and Technology

projects.name: Open Source CLI Generator
projects.description: Built a command-line scaffolding tool that generates production-ready Node.js and TypeScript project templates with integrated CI/CD, Docker configs, and testing setup. Received 1.2k GitHub stars and 50+ weekly npm downloads.

projects.name: Real-Time Chat Platform
projects.description: Designed and deployed a WebSocket-based chat application supporting 10k concurrent connections with message persistence, typing indicators, and end-to-end encryption using Socket.io and Redis pub/sub.

certifications.title: AWS Solutions Architect – Associate
certifications.description: Validated expertise in designing distributed systems on AWS, including compute, storage, networking, and security services.

certifications.title: Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
certifications.description: Demonstrated proficiency in Kubernetes cluster management, workload scheduling, networking, and troubleshooting.

awards.title: Best Innovation Award
awards.description: Recognized for designing and implementing a cost optimization strategy that reduced annual cloud spending by $144,000.

awards.title: Hackathon Winner – Smart City Track
awards.description: Won first place for developing a real-time traffic optimization system using computer vision and edge computing.
